name: Hasura
description: Hasura gives you instant GraphQL and REST APIs on your databases. Use this API to manage your Hasura project metadata, run GraphQL queries, track tables, manage permissions, and configure event triggers.

capabilities.name: run_graphql_query
capabilities.description: Execute GraphQL queries and mutations against your Hasura endpoint.

capabilities.name: manage_metadata
capabilities.description: Track tables, set up relationships, and configure permissions via the metadata API.

capabilities.name: run_sql
capabilities.description: Execute raw SQL statements against your database through Hasura.

capabilities.name: manage_event_triggers
capabilities.description: Create and manage event triggers that fire webhooks on database changes.

capabilities.name: manage_scheduled_triggers
capabilities.description: Create and manage cron-based or one-off scheduled events.
